description: A logo featuring a green stylized "C" or crescent shape enclosing two graphic elements. On the left are four vertical bars of varying heights, representing urban or built-up areas. On the right is a stylized wheat stalk, representing agriculture or natural land. To the right of the graphic, the text "Land Monitoring" is displayed in two lines, in a lighter green colour. The entire logo is rendered in shades of green/yellow-green.
